checkbox.name: subtitles
checkbox.desc: If turned off, all subtitles will be disable. Keep off if you hate subtitles.

checkbox.name: mechanics
checkbox.desc: If turned off, mechainics such as the 15 misses mechainic will be disabled. Keep off if you suck.

checkbox.name: shaders
checkbox.desc: If turned off, all shaders will be disabled. Keep off if you hate shaders.
